title: American Grilled Cheese Sandwich

subs.name: any thick-sliced bread including brown bread, multigrain or even toasted paratha for a fusion version
mayonnaise spread on the outside of the bread gives an even crisper, browner crust

ingredients.name: cheese (processed or mozzarella), sliced or grated

subs.name: Amul processed cheese slices are ideal — they melt fast and evenly; mozzarella is a good fresh alternative

steps.text: Spread a thin, even layer of softened butter on one side of each bread slice. Be sure to reach all the way to the edges — this is what creates an evenly golden crust.
Heat a frying pan or tawa on medium-low flame. Place two slices butter-side down in the pan. You should hear a gentle sizzle — if the butter browns immediately, the heat is too high.
Lay the cheese evenly over the bread in the pan. Add a grind of black pepper if you like. Top with the remaining two slices, butter-side up.
Cook on medium-low for 3–4 minutes until the bottom is deep golden and releases cleanly from the pan. Press down gently once or twice with a spatula to encourage the cheese to start melting.

Flip carefully and cook the second side for 2–3 minutes until equally golden and the cheese is completely melted — you should see it beginning to flow out at the edges. A gooey pull when you lift a corner is the sign it is ready.
Cut diagonally and serve immediately — grilled cheese waits for no one and loses its magic within a few minutes of leaving the pan.

cross_contact_notes: Ingredient metadata cannot prove an allergen-free kitchen. Check packaged labels and cross-contact statements for your products.
trust.provenance_summary: AI-assisted original draft; declared licence original.
trust.substitution_warning: A substitution can introduce allergens or change dietary suitability. Never claim a swap is safe without checking the replacement's label and the user's allergy context.

substitution_notes: cheese → Amul processed cheese slices are ideal — they melt fast and evenly; mozzarella is a good fresh alternative; butter → mayonnaise spread on the outside of the bread gives an even crisper, browner crust; bread → any thick-sliced bread including brown bread, multigrain or even toasted paratha for a fusion version
indian_kitchen_adaptation: A flat tawa or any non-stick frying pan works perfectly. Amul butter is ideal for flavour. Amul or Britannia processed cheese slices are the closest match to American cheese and melt beautifully. Add a thin slice of green chilli or a dash of chilli sauce inside for a desi kick without changing the technique.
